rules: Use Bebas Neue (uppercase) with tracking-wide for all major headings and scoreboard numbers.
Never use Inter or generic sans. Manrope provides clean legibility for dense sports data and chat messages.
Headings > 32px must use tight letter spacing.
Data metrics (goals, assists, stats, player numbers) must use JetBrains Mono for tabular alignment.
No generic gradients. Use solid high-contrast colors.
Never use pure black or gray, always tint heavily towards blue/cool tones (Slate).
Use Turf Green (#10B981) purely as a functional color (attendance confirmed, match won).
CRITICAL: DO NOT use complete transparent background in header, overlays, any surface that has content under it. Example: Dropdown with transparent background.

visual_enhancers.surfaces: Tactical Minimalism. Replace soft shadows with 1px solid strokes (border-border) and 0-4px border radius. Hard, athletic edges that signify precision.
visual_enhancers.effects: Grid Borders (Technical Look) for all dashboard widgets and stats tables. Use border-collapse style layouts.
visual_enhancers.textures: Subtle dot-matrix or diagonal mesh patterns in the background of hero headers to mimic sports jerseys.

grids_and_layouts.dashboard: High Density Bento Grid. Base: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4. Gap: gap-4 or gap-6. Every pixel utilized. Main chart span-3, sidebar feed span-1.
grids_and_layouts.spacing: Generous Spacing Philosophy. Use p-6 or p-8 inside cards to avoid text collision.
grids_and_layouts.alignment: Left-align dense content. Top-right for actions/filters. Mobile-first responsive, crucially for players confirming attendance on mobile.

components.buttons: Sharp rectangular (rounded-sm or rounded-none), high-contrast. Hover state translates Y by -2px with an inner shadow. Primary button uses Dynamic Blue.
components.cards: Flat solid background (surface color), 1px subtle border, NO shadow. On hover: border color darkens to primary.
components.tables: Shadcn UI tables customized. Grid lines visible on all cells (border-b and border-r) for a technical stats look.
components.navigation: Solid background with a hard bottom border. If scrolling, use Crystal Glass (backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/70 + 1px bottom border).
components.forms: Shadcn form components. Input backgrounds slightly tinted (surface color) with sharp focus states (ring-2 ring-primary).
components.chat: Distinct bubble styles for team chat. Clear visual differentiation between sent/received messages using primary and surface colors.

motion.entrance: Staggered fade-in-up for lists and feed items.
motion.rules: Respect prefers-reduced-motion. Animations must feel snappy and athletic, not floaty.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure 4.5:1 ratio for normal text. Use Text Shadow on hero images.
accessibility.focus: High contrast ring for all interactive elements.
accessibility.testing: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case to facilitate robust automated testing.

images.description: Two players compete in a fast-paced roller hockey game

media.icons: Use lucide-react (default). For specialized sports icons, install and use @phosphor-icons/react (Duotone/Bold weights).

3d_libraries.recommendation: Use Recharts for game statistics and player performance trends. Do not use complex 3D libraries unless rendering a rink diagram (then use simple Canvas).
3d_libraries.charts: Recharts wrapped in Shadcn chart components. Use Primary Blue and Turf Green for data lines.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build the dashboard using pure HTML/Tailwind for structural layout (Bento grids).
Use Shadcn components for complex interactions (Tables, Dropdowns, DatePicker).
Do NOT use 'Inter' for headings. Inject Bebas Neue font for an athletic look.
Do NOT use generic gradients or soft shadows. Use hard 1px borders for a tactical feel.
Ensure the Convocations/Attendance feature is mobile-first, using large tap targets.
Ensure 'data-testid' is present on all actionable items.
Follow the High Density Grid protocol for the main dashboard analytics.
UNIVERSAL GUIDELINES FOR MAIN AGENT: You tend to converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. Avoid this. Make creative, distinctive frontends.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur).
You MUST NOT apply universal transition (e.g., transition: all). Add transitions for specific interactive elements.
You MUST NOT center align the app container (.App { text-align: center; }). This disrupts reading flow.
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations.
NEVER use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠💭💡🔮🎯 for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
Missing categories (especially sponsor logos) = main agent will use placeholder text which is FORBIDDEN.
Components MUST use named exports, Pages MUST use default exports.
GENERAL UI UX DESIGN GUIDELINES: Consistency: Maintain consistent styling, padding, and font usage across all pages to build trust.
Hierarchy: Always employ clear visual hierarchy (size, weight, color) to guide the user's eye to the most important metric (e.g., next game time, score).
Feedback: Provide immediate visual feedback for user actions (toast notifications, button loading states, active styles).
Frictionless Input: Optimize forms (login, convocation response) for rapid input. Auto-focus fields, use clear labels, and avoid unnecessary questions.
